descriptionParagraphs: FIG. 1 is a perspective view of a filter accessory for carafe embodying my new design;FIG. 2 is a front elevational view of FIG. 1;FIG. 3 is a rear elevational view of FIG. 2;FIG. 4 is a right side elevational view of FIG. 2, with the left side elevational view being a mirror image thereof; and,FIG. 5 is a bottom plan view of FIG. 2, with the top plan view being a mirror image thereof.
claims: CLAIM I claim the ornamental design for a filter accessory for carafe, as shown and described.
